description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Ubuntu build that runs on every push. Use multiple ubuntu-latest jobs with different container images (ubuntu:bionic, ubuntu:focal, ubuntu:jammy) and install git, checkout code with submodules, install dependencies, build, and deploy using custom scripts in the ci directory. Use various compilers (GCC 8, GCC 10, GCC 12, Clang 10, Clang 14) and configure the build process accordingly.
